caption: The video begins with a scene inside a home where four people are gathered around a white circular dining table. A man in a white short-sleeved button-down shirt sits on the left, while a woman in a white top, a man in a grey t-shirt, and a woman in a blue shirt are positioned around the table. They are in the middle of a meal with plates of food, glasses of orange juice, and a bowl on the table. The man in the grey shirt is gesturing with his hand while speaking. The scene then abruptly cuts to an exterior shot of the White House in Washington, D.C., under a bright blue sky. The white neoclassical building features a prominent pillared porch and a fountain spraying water in the foreground. A United States flag flies from the roof, and green hedges line the bottom of the frame. The final two segments of the video remain on this static shot of the White House.
